overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city at night. The scene features towering neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements including a giant red koi fish, and elevated walkways transitioning to ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass pedestrian walkway with neon city views

events.description: holographic red koi fish swims out of view to the left
character follows the curved walkway turning slightly left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated glass walkway, observing the neon cityscape and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the same elevated path

entered.detail: large glowing red holographic fish swimming in the air between skyscrapers
tall futuristic buildings covered in neon advertisements and lights
transparent glass pedestrian bridge with glowing blue edge lights
bright spotlights cutting through the rain and atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated walkway high above the city, with a massive holographic red koi fish swimming between the neon-lit skyscrapers. The character walks along the curved glass pathway as the holographic fish exits view, surrounded by the glow of searchlights and building advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza beneath overpass with illuminated floor panels

events.description: entering covered area beneath concrete overpass, sky becomes obscured
lighting shifts from neon city glow to warm artificial ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass cover, moving through the sheltered plaza area with illuminated flooring

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and pillars of the overpass providing shelter from rain
square glowing panels embedded in the walkway floor providing ambient light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the rain is blocked and the lighting shifts to warm artificial sources. The walkway features illuminated floor panels, and the neon skyscrapers become visible only on the left side as the path continues under the shelter.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone with stairway descent to lower plaza level

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area back into open rain
beginning descent down stairs to lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairway from the elevated walkway to the ground level plaza, approaching the building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the building entrance at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: wet concrete stairs with railings leading down to the lower plaza
large building facade with repeating DREAM text in pink and white neon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area back into the rain, the character approaches and begins descending a stairway to the lower plaza level. The neon DREAM sign becomes visible on the building facade ahead as the elevated walkway recedes to the left and the ground level entrance approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground level plaza with building entrance and reflective wet surfaces

events.description: pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas become visible near the entrance
slowing approach toward the building entrance doors

agents.ego_description: walking across the plaza toward the building entrance, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian holding an umbrella with glowing orange light panel walking toward entrance
pedestrian walking with dark umbrella moving across the plaza

entered.detail: modern glass entrance with automatic doors and warm interior lighting
rain-soaked plaza floor reflecting neon lights and building illumination
small illuminated guard station or kiosk with red and white signage

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the ground level plaza, approaching the building entrance with its glass doors and prominent neon DREAM signage. The wet pavement reflects the surrounding lights, and several pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas cross the plaza as the character slows near the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched elevated walkway high above the city into a sheltered, artificial plaza. It begins on a curved glass pathway where a massive holographic red koi fish swims between neon-lit skyscrapers amidst the glow of searchlights and advertisements. As the character advances and the holographic fish exits the frame, the camera follows the path toward a massive concrete overpass. The scene then shifts from the open rain to a covered environment, where the lighting transitions to warm artificial sources and the floor becomes lined with illuminated panels. Finally, the towering skyscrapers recede to the left as the camera moves deeper under the shelter of the overpass.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered walkway down into a rain-slicked urban plaza dominated by neon lights. It begins as the character exits a covered area and steps back into the rain, descending a stairway toward the lower plaza level while the elevated walkway recedes to the left. As the character moves downward, a prominent neon DREAM sign emerges on the building facade ahead, guiding the path toward the ground level entrance. The scene then opens into the wide plaza, where the wet pavement begins to mirror the vibrant surrounding lights and pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas cross the path. Finally, the camera slows as it approaches the glass doors of the building entrance, bringing the glowing signage into sharp focus.
